creator: neelwebs@gmail.com
text:
When I play a video with mplayer2, and then go back to Firefox, Xorg shuts down and I go back to the command line. Is it a problem with mplayer2 or firefox? 
And if you want to know, I am using the Fluxbox window manager.

How-To-Repeat: 1. Open up Firefox.
2. Play a video in mplayer2
3. Go back to Firefox
